svg.title: NevUp Track 1 — Docker Compose topology
svg.desc: Four containers: api, worker, postgres-ts, and redis with healthcheck dependency arrows and environment variable callouts.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the TimescaleDB Docker image and migration setup for NevUp Track 1')
sendPrompt('Explain the Redis container config for Streams and ZSET in NevUp Track 1')
sendPrompt('Show me the Dockerfile for the NevUp api service in Go')
sendPrompt('Show me the worker Dockerfile and consumer group startup for NevUp')
